meta.title: ICS Is Doing Threat Intelligence Wrong - Targeteering Is Needed
meta.description:
Anna Skelton at S4x23 makes the case that most ICS threat intel is too reactive and needs to be proactive. She then presents a 5-step targeteering process will help you be more proactive and effective.

Anna shares resources she has found helpful for each step of the process and gives relevant ICS examples. She finishes with the tough question of when it is time to stop.
